pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh line 22 and export_result.sh line 9
Verified in setup_task.sh line 23 and export_result.sh line 10
Verified in setup_task.sh line 26 where specification is created

Task description states 'Diagram must have at least 13 components'. The payment system specification (created by setup_task.sh) lists exactly 13 components: Customer Browser, Mobile App, Web Server, API Gateway, Authentication Service, Payment Processor, Fraud Detection Engine, Notification Service, User Database, Transaction Database, Audit Log, Payment Gateway (Stripe/Adyen), and Bank Network.
Task description states 'Diagram must have at least 13 components and 12 labeled data flows.' The specification lists 16 data flows, but the metadata requirement of 12 matches the task description.

The payment system specification lists 4 trust boundaries/zones: (1) Internet/Untrusted Zone, (2) DMZ (Demilitarized Zone), (3) Internal Network (High Trust), and (4) External Partner Network. Task description states 'Trust boundaries must be dashed shapes' but does not explicitly specify minimum count.

According to STRIDE threat modeling framework (Microsoft, 1999), the six categories are: Spoofing Identity, Tampering with Data, Repudiation, Information Disclosure, Denial of Service, and Elevation of Privilege. The metadata field lists incomplete versions. Additionally, the actual verification code (export_result.sh lines 56-59) looks for 8 keywords: 'spoofing', 'tampering', 'repudiation', 'information', 'disclosure', 'denial', 'elevation', 'privilege' - which covers the full category names.

All 13 keywords in the metadata match corresponding components in the payment system specification: browser (Customer Browser), mobile (Mobile App), web (Web Server), api (API Gateway), auth (Authentication Service), processor (Payment Processor), fraud (Fraud Detection Engine), notification (Notification Service), user (User Database), transaction (Transaction Database), audit (Audit Log), bank (Bank Network), gateway (API Gateway, Payment Gateway).

privileged_info_summary: The stride_threat_model_dfd task uses entirely synthetic data generated by the setup_task.sh script. The payment system specification lists 13 components, 16 data flows, and 4 trust boundaries. The task metadata contains three discrepancies: (1) min_components claims 10, but the task description and actual specification require 13; (2) required_stride_categories field lists incomplete category names (e.g., 'information' instead of 'Information Disclosure'), while the verification code checks for 8 STRIDE-related keywords covering all six proper categories; (3) min_boundaries claims 3, but the specification defines 4 trust zones. Component keywords are all verified as present in the specification.
